scope: zero-field, epoch, flag, and derivation-error precedence
u128 quantity and u64 epoch preservation
public API forgery resistance and reject-no-op behavior
tests, atlas, Kani, Miri, fuzz, coverage, and mutation claims

findings: WP3b is the smallest honest next boundary
a final ResourceV1 would overclaim policy and state authority
zero-quantity marker permission is a real deferred schema gap
the API and closed local error shape were made explicit
the version-specific type fixes schema fields but proves no decoder provenance
local error precedence is documented as non-stable and non-final
compile-fail caller-forgery evidence and reject-no-op evidence were required
no semantic, body-to-ID substitution, authority-boundary, or code-quality blocker remained
documentation overclaims were narrowed
symbolic full-width preservation and arbitrary nonzero flag harnesses were added
the no-op test was broadened to every public semantic reject family
no prohibited private context, credential, absolute local path, hidden-tool reference, or generated artifact was present
the worklog and conformance claims required synchronization with completed evidence
four serial 900-second fuzz campaigns required more than a 60-minute job budget
assurance claims required a revision-bound local evidence receipt and named mutation map
completed agent-review claims required a scoped revision-bound review receipt
an end-to-end byte-decoder-to-intrinsic fuzz target would be a useful later assurance extension
allocation-free resource-ID derivation remains a future determinism hardening opportunity
all 27 canonical gate records and their index and environment bindings matched
the mutation map matched records 07 through 09 exactly
the nightly fuzz and Miri jobs retained measured execution headroom
CBC-039 preserved the human-review and promotion boundaries
the committed assurance delta contained no prohibited private context or publication artifact

publication_blocker_disposition.evidence: .github/workflows/nightly.yml sets a 90-minute fuzz job timeout; evidence/wp3b-remediation-attestation-2026-07-11.json records the independent closure check

publication_blocker_disposition.finding: missing revision-bound assurance and mutation receipts

suggestion_disposition.suggestion: end-to-end bytes through decoder into intrinsic construction fuzzing
suggestion_disposition.reason: the current WP1 decoder target and WP3b structure-aware target are separate honest evidence lanes; combined ingress fuzzing remains useful future work
private fields and the sole constructor currently prevent injection; a dedicated UI diagnostic assertion can harden regression specificity
the current path is bounded and fail-closed, while allocation-dependent valid-input behavior must be reconsidered before a final consensus or authority claim

non_claims: agent review does not replace human Class C review
review does not prove unbounded correctness or cryptographic correctness
review does not establish policy validity, funds safety, or production readiness
deferred suggestions remain explicit assurance debt
